summary: The project now has bounded workflow planning, research and analysis paths, structured traces, audit persistence, and a minimal Streamlit UI. The next push is to strengthen tool integration and make the usability layer more inspection-friendly.
completed_items: Closed-loop supervisor orchestration with research, writing, and optional review stages
Bounded workflow planning that routes between research and analysis requests
Structured workflow output with workflow plans, traces, and intermediate results
Local audit persistence, acceptance reporting, request cache, and retry plumbing
Minimal Streamlit UI for task input, plan preview, traces, and result export
next_items: Add ToolManager and the first practical tool adapters
Expose recent persisted runs and inspection details in the UI
Expand usability and integration tests around planning and UI-assisted workflows
